programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting

programme.desc: The new manager has everyone vying to make good first impressions. Andy finds himself awkwardly typecast, and Jim and Pam worry they may have come on too strong.

programme.desc: Michael trains Deangeloe on how to take over the job of hosting the Dundie Awards.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Michael
programme.desc: Michael is leaving for Colorado but wants one day without drama in order to say goodbye to his co-workers. Deangelo and Andy scramble to keep Michael's biggest clients.

programme.title: The Office: The Inner Circle

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Wine and Roses
programme.desc: Moira is hired as the spokesperson for a local winery. Meanwhile, Alexis gets a little too close to Mutt while David struggles with a mysterious health problem.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Carl's Funeral
programme.desc: Johnny reluctantly agrees to speak at the funeral of a local man he doesn't really know. Alexis struggles with her new boyfriend's love of animals.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Jazzagals
programme.desc: Moira attempts to join the town’s a cappella group. Alexis enjoys the heady first days of her latest relationship. And Johnny helps out at Bob’s Garage despite himself.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Moira's Nudes
programme.desc: Moira worries that salacious photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign. Johnny swallows his pride to ask for financial help. Alexis becomes gainfully and surprisingly employed.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: New Car
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira feign poverty in an attempt to get a deal on a used car, while David helps Stevie lay her great-aunt to rest.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: RIP Moira Rose
programme.desc: A rumor of Moira's death appears online and Roland asks Johnny to be his child's godfather.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Crowening
programme.desc: While Moira is in Bosnia filming the 'Crows' movie she hopes will revive her acting career, David attempts to take his relationship with Patrick to new heights.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Premiere
programme.desc: Alexis plans a local premiere for the 'Crows' movie and Moira makes a big splash on the red carpet. David tends to Patrick after his wisdom teeth removal.

programme.title: South Park: Board Girls

programme.title: South Park: Raising the Bar

programme.title: South Park: A Boy and a Priest

programme.title: South Park: Insecurity

programme.title: South Park: Funnybot
programme.desc: Jimmy hosts the Special Ed Department's First Annual Comedy Awards.

programme.title: South Park: Member Berries

programme.title: South Park: Let Go, Let Gov

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rumours of the Chief's departure spreads among the hospital staff; Bailey proposes the creation of a free clinic and a Seattle Grace doctor receives a proposal of a different sort.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Wishin' and Hopin'
programme.desc: The race for the chief's position is on, as the doctors compete for Richard's affections, a surgical patient endangers the lives of those around her. In the meantime, Meredith's mother, Ellis, experiences a change in her medical condition.

programme.title: The Closer: Split Ends
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson has her hands full trying to solve a murder when a hairdresser on a movie set is found dead. Meanwhile, Brenda's folks are in town pressuring her to set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Closer: Tijuana Brass
programme.desc: Brenda faces a potential mess when the bodies of two south-of-the-border detectives are found dead in the back of a truck.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Moral Hazard
programme.desc: After a shootout in a tow yard leaves three people dead, Major Crimes must scramble to find a disturbed man with a bag full of guns and a long list of grievances before he kills again. Meanwhile, Rusty goes against LAPD policy while looking for evidence.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Off the Wagon
programme.desc: Andy and Mike delve into the mysterious overdose of a young Hollywood star and the trail of emotional destruction he left in his wake. Meanwhile, Rusty finally comes to a conclusion about how to handle the pregnancy of his biological mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Family Law
programme.desc: When a jogger takes a nasty fall down the steps of L.A.'s storied Greek Theatre, Major Crimes finds itself investigating a divorce attorney with a lot of angry clients, and Lt. Tao goes undercover in the world of college age hookers.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps
programme.desc: The murder of a college student takes an odd turn when Jane and Maura discover he had 32 girlfriends. Uncovering who killed him and why leads them into a world of app developers, virtual boyfriends, and relationships built on lies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: Gods, Guns and Government (Part 1)
programme.desc: We analyze the reasons for the raid of a bizarre religious compound in Waco, Texas in 1993, and look at what was happening inside the Branch Davidian compound.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: End of Days (Part 2)
programme.desc: The siege at Waco ended in a fiery battle that killed David Koresh, his followers, and his multiple wives and children. TV news crews and demonstrators watched in horror as the ranch went up in flames.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Tom Petty: Mysterious Ending
programme.desc: News of the sudden passing of celebrated rock musician Tom Petty shocked fans worldwide, but a deeper look into the music legend’s life reveals physical and emotional afflictions that may have led to his death at age 66.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Gin Craze
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make gin, a notorious spirit with medieval roots that is still prized in the backwoods today. Judged by legendary shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Holiday Showdown
programme.desc: In the spirit of Christmas and a new season of Master Distiller, Tickle challenges fellow moonshiners Josh, Mike and Daniel to compete to make the tastiest Christmas spirits. Mark, Digger, and Tim judge who wins a special backwoods prize.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: American Whiskey
programme.desc: Heritage grains meet charred oak as three amateur distillers compete to make the best American Whiskey. Judged by Mark, Digger and Tim, they'll go head to head in a series of challenges to determine who has what it takes to be Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mason Jar Shortage
programme.desc: A Mason jar shortage puts a lid on Mark and Digger's distribution plans. Mike and Jerry must return to land they've been warned off. Tim's scheme to repurpose a massive tank as an oversized pot still pushes his steam boiler to the breaking point.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Memphis vs. NOLA Pt 1
programme.desc: The Memphis Street Outlaws are back and prepared to battle Team NOLA in the final matchup of the season. JJ and the MSO are fresh in the competition but NOLA is hungry and have the horsepower to pull off an upset.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Memphis vs. NOLA Pt 2
programme.desc: The streets are still hot and the battle continues to rage between Memphis and NOLA. Memphis may be out-powered and outgunned but with $100,000 on the line, NOLA must remain on their toes if they want to stay ahead and come out with a win.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Let the Rivalries Begin
programme.desc: The battle begins as a 1964 Thunderbird, 2002 Nissan Xterra and a 1955 Ford Fairlane are auctioned off.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: The crew find an abandon package that looks a little suspicious. A late model Mercedes-Benz seems like a good flip.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Tale of the Filthy Greengo
programme.desc: The battle is on for a '64 Mercury comet caliente, a 1995 Jeep Wranger and a Ford F-100 Unibody pickup.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Dukin' Donuts
programme.desc: The car flippers see serious dough over this week's auction cars, but one of the cars just may be cursed. Up for auction, a 1960 Ford F-100 panel truck, a '64 Chevy Impala, and a 1993 Lexus SC 300.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cool Customline
programme.desc: KC's beloved but broken down '55 Ford Customline gets new life and Richard needs to flip it to Shark Tank's Mark Cuban. George Foreman takes off with Richard's prize Mustang while Richard and Dennis haggle with a WWII vet over a '38 Aston Martin.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dale Jr.'s Sick Nomad
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew build NASCAR royalty Dale Earnhardt Jr. a 1956 Chevy Nomad. While Richard and Aaron travel to Dale Jr's Carolina home with the Nomad, the crew finds ways to cool off in the Texas heat.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part I
programme.desc: The crew takes on a '68 Shelby Mustang that looks sweet, but what's it hiding? Richard flips his lid when Tom and Jordan buy two junker cars from two tourists. Richard and KC travel to a secret lair to make a deal on a Lotus Cortina and an amphibicar.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part II
programme.desc: Engine issues plague the '68 Shelby. Richard flips the rare '66 Lotus Cortina and floating Amphicar for some fast cash. A classic Ford Falcon arrives at the garage and selling it would be icing on the cake.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Aaron's Falcon Racecar
programme.desc: Aaron falls in love with and buys a famous '63 Ford Falcon race car off Richard, but will the original owner be impressed by Aaron's Gas Money style? Meanwhile, Richard flips a 1919 Nash and an unusually painted truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part I
programme.desc: Richard makes a risky deal to restore the first two Firebirds ever made from rusted and rough to museum quality. The buyer offers a handsome deal, but it comes with a crushing deadline and a 10K/day penalty for every day he's late. Aaron learns to race.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Poppy Bowl
programme.desc: Bursting with insider facts, Dr. Sandra Lee leads the parade of pops, lipomas, and skin conditions in this special.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales
programme.desc: The Slatons head back to Atlanta to see Dr. Procter. Amy is worried about dropping the news that she got pregnant so soon after surgery, against doctor's orders. Tammy returns knowing she's gained all the weight back.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wake-Up Call
programme.desc: Tammy and Amy blame each other for their issues in therapy. When Tammy gets devastating news from Dr. Procter, her brother Chris makes a life-altering decision. A very pregnant Amy can't stop overeating, and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Dropping Bombs
programme.desc: Tammy's new doctor gives her what feels like an insurmountable weight goal, but it's not the only challenge she's facing. Amy and Michael drop a bomb that changes everything.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Deadly Stroll/ Unholy Secret
programme.desc: In Rhode Island, policewomen go undercover as street walkers to nab the man suspected of murdering three prostitutes. And a dagger-shaped letter opener is the key piece of evidence that links a priest to the grisly 1980 murder of a nun in Toledo.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Caught on Camera I
programme.desc: Three of The First 48's most memorable cases featuring surveillance video are highlighted, including a robbery in Cleveland, an encounter in a Dallas elevator and a misleading story in Memphis.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: The Case That Haunts Me II
programme.desc: In Atlanta, investigators are haunted by the gruesome rape and murder of two women; in New Orleans, detectives search for suspects who drowned a local couple; in Harris County, a woman who was badly burned struggles to survive.

programme.title: The First 48: Bad Love
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a young woman is brutally gunned down in broad daylight. And Detective Justin Ritter suspects the witnesses know more than they are saying.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food Ya Never Ate Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe try a dish they've never eaten, and a special guest stops by. Plus, Q drops a world premiere music video for his diabolical new song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Holiday Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe reminisce about their Christmas past. Joe surprises everyone with a holiday-themed wardrobe request.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Four Meals, One Color Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a meal that can only be one color, and Patty Jenkins helps determine if Murr is a bad husband.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Pizza

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Finale
programme.desc: Four Comfort Food Feud champions return to a decked-out outdoor arena to battle for the $25,000 prize and the title of Chopped Grand Champion. In each round, the ingredient baskets contain delicious reminders of the tournament's culinary themes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha on Ice
programme.desc: Trisha & Glenda prepare for ice skating lessons with the Predators! In exchange for lessons, they make them glazed limoncello cookies. Trisha and Glenda come home to make a hearty meal of chicken spinach lasagna and prosciutto-wrapped breadsticks.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Game Day With The Nashville Predators
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is a huge fan of the Nashville Predators, so she's invited them over to eat, hang out and laugh about the time Ryan Johansen dragged Glenda across the ice. The game-day spread includes loaded curly fry nachos, Philly cheesesteak and more.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Italian Favorites
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her love of an Italian meal by cooking up a menu filled with an abundance of flavour and memories. She invites her neighbour, Kathy, to help, and Trisha learns how to make fresh pasta from scratch!

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Mama Mia, What a Meatball!
programme.desc: Inspired by his mom's cooking, Michael Symon masters chicken parmesan meatballs on the grill. Later, Symon's wife Liz joins him to cook soft polenta over their fire pit. Then, Liz makes a simple vinegar and cream dressing for Michael's mom's garden salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Simple Speedy Dishes
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares their favourite recipes that are fast and flavourful. Katie Lee begins with a quick, easy way to make a classic with her grilled chicken parmesan and Alex Guarnaschelli shares a simple pork, tofu and vegetable stir fry.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Our Best Big Batch Recipes
programme.desc: The Kitchen is making big batch recipes that are perfect for meal prep or family dinners. Jeff Mauro starts with his escarole, sausage, peppers and beans cheat sheet on the grill. Then, Geoffrey Zakarian makes a big batch of his Ratatouille.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fun Family Favorites
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up quick dishes the whole family will love. Jeff Mauro combines two family favourites in his pizza stuffed chicken. Then, Katie Lee's sesame cauliflower is a takeout fake out with no guilt.

programme.title: Kitchen Crash: Meat on the Street
programme.desc: On the peaceful streets of East Windsor, N.J., Jeff Mauro brings three chefs to raid the kitchens of unsuspecting homeowners in search of ingredients for three cooking battles. Jeff and judge Leah Cohen keep the chefs on their toes.

programme.title: Chopped: Hot Stuff
programme.desc: In the first round the heat is on with habanero peppers. In the entree round, the competitors must work with one of the hottest peppers known to man.

programme.title: Chopped: Grudge Match: Battle 1
programme.desc: A $100,000 grand prize is up for grabs in this tournament event, featuring some of the most brilliant stars of the game. One ambitious champion runs into problems in the first round, and something stinky in the entree basket has the competitors nervous.

programme.title: Below Deck: A Recipe for Disaster

programme.title: Below Deck: 12 Seconds in Heaven

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Sorry You Feel That Way

programme.title: Below Deck: Yacht-pocalypse Now
programme.desc: The crew tries to redeem themselves with returning charter guests after Ashton cancels a beach picnic which throws the entire boat into complete chaos. Rhylee and Ashton continue to butt heads while Tanner and Simone contemplate their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Exodus

programme.title: Below Deck: Witch Hunt

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lou's Still the Boss but Now There's a Ross

programme.title: Bunk'd: Rise of the Machine
programme.desc: Noah and Ava face a new challenge when they take over the 'PeeWeeWaka' day camp program for younger campers. Meanwhile, Destiny and Finn express very different styles when they co-host the camp radio news show.

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case
programme.desc: Eager to play in Luke's basketball game, Ravi unexpectedly runs into LA Clippers star Chris Paul, who he enlists to coach him. Meanwhile, Jessie learns that Hudson is her new classmate and is unhappily forced to partner with him for an assignment.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Cop to It
programme.desc: Raven worries Tess is in trouble after the new building manager looks for the culprit behind the side of the building being tagged.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Weirder Things
programme.desc: The kids win a contest to go to a private screening of their favorite TV show.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Continued-A-Rooney
programme.desc: While Joey and Maddie try to catch Diggie before he departs for Australia, Liv covers for Maddie at home. But when Diggie shows up at the Rooney house, chaos ensues, reminding Parker of his favourite soap opera drama.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Voltage-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Maddie enlists Liv's help to build a giant Paulie Porcupine head for the Homecoming parade, but Joey and Parker accidentally destroy it while playing around with a stunt-prop from Liv's TV show, 'Voltage'.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Burdens and Boynado

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Duets and Destiny
programme.desc: Years after the gang has gone their separate ways, Ally, Austin, Trish and Dez meet-up and learn what they have all been up to, individually.

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.desc: Every story has behind-the-scenes facts, insights, and often jaw-dropping allegations that we wish we had time to share on television. Well, now we can. This special episode features details about these investigations never before seen on 'Snapped.'

programme.title: Dateline: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Chris Hansen reports on four extraordinary cases of women who were caught on videotape ordering murderous hits.

programme.title: Dateline: Double Lives
programme.desc: After a mother of three vanishes in Colorado, police discover she was living a dangerous double life.

programme.title: Dateline: Double Lives
programme.desc: After a mother of three vanishes in Colorado, police discover she was living a dangerous double life.

programme.title: NCIS: Minimum Security
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team travel to Cuba to investigate the death of a translator.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Tuhon
programme.desc: Sam and Callen head to Mexico to search for Tuhon, a retired assassin they encountered on their very first case together. Meanwhile, Nate and Deeks stay in Los Angeles to assist with the investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Following an explosion at a fish market, the team partners with an undercover DEA agent to determine if the incident is an act of terrorism or a botched drug smuggling deal. Meanwhile, in Afghanistan, Granger and Kensi investigate a helicopter crash.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Between the Lines
programme.desc: When an undercover agent is identified and executed by a local gang, the NCIS team must locate the mole before other agents' lives are put in danger. Meanwhile, Granger begins to worry when Kensi disappears in Afghanistan.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Zero Days
programme.desc: The team is called in to determine if the computer system that controls Russian missiles is at risk after Eric overhears his friend, a computer systems expert, being attacked during online game play.

programme.title: NCIS: Eye Spy
programme.desc: A naval officer, who was hired by an outside agency to test a product, is found murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: Bete Noir
programme.desc: Ducky and his assistant Gerald are held hostage in the autopsy room of NCIS headquarters.

programme.title: NCIS: A Weak Link
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the death of a SEAL that occurred during a training exercise. As the investigation progresses, they come to suspect that the death was a murder rather than an accident.

programme.title: NCIS: Reveille
programme.desc: The terrorist from 'Bête Noire' returns with a plan to attack the President. Gibbs and his team must follow the clues to reveal his identity and find Kate, who was kidnapped by the terrorist.

programme.title: NCIS: Lt. Jane Doe
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the murder and rape of an unidentified Navy lieutenant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl Code
programme.desc: After a photo Marge posts on social media gets Homer fired, he returns to the best job he ever had, a dishwasher at a Greek restaurant. This same post inspires Lisa to code an app that predicts the real-life consequences of anything you post online.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Left Behind
programme.desc: Homer gets Flanders a job at the plant, and he soon learns that no good deed goes unpunished when Flanders starts to insist on carpools and demands more from Homer's work performance. Meanwhile, Marge feels as though their marriage has lost its spark.

programme.title: Family Guy: Start Me Up
programme.desc: Peter’s non-stop sweating becomes a liability at his company, so his boss tells him to work from home. Meanwhile, after Stewie and Chris cause thousands of dollars in damage to an electronics store, the two create a fake Kickstarter campaign.

programme.title: Family Guy: Better Off Meg
programme.desc: When Meg is erroneously reported to have died in a car crash, she goes along with the story to start a new life elsewhere. Meanwhile, the Griffins experience a life without Meg.

programme.title: Family Guy: Absolutely Babulous
programme.desc: When Stewie receives a participation medal in his school's toddler games, he begins to question everything he has ever won. Meanwhile, Peter causes a fight between Lois' parents and must repair the damage he caused.

programme.title: Family Guy: Movin' in (Principal Shepherd's Song)
programme.desc: Principal Shepherd moves in with the Griffins after he is fired for fat-shaming Chris at school. Meanwhile, Brian sues Stewie for writing a series of children's books which portray him as an idiot.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Movement
programme.desc: When Peter starts coaching for Quahog's minor league baseball team, he gets constipated during the national anthem and must kneel, unintentionally becoming the face of racial justice.

programme.title: Family Guy: Coma Guy
programme.desc: With a newfound love for rocking out to Van Halen, Peter gets in a car accident and falls into a coma.

programme.title: Family Guy: Baby Stewie
programme.desc: Stewie builds a DNA-altering machine that will allow him to remain smart forever, but the invention has the adverse effect and he instead transforms into what he should have always been an actual baby.

programme.title: Family Guy: Holly Bibble
programme.desc: Cooped up in a hotel room due to a big storm, the Griffins pass the time by reimagining three stories from the Bible.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Holidays of Future Passed
programme.desc: The Simpsons flash forward 30 years and find themselves in a tech-savvy, futuristic Springfield. Bart and Lisa have children of their own and decide to spend the holidays as one big family at Homer and Marge's house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Politically Inept With Homer Simpson

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Sahara
programme.desc: In 1965, a beautiful 25 mile structure called the Eye of the Sahara was found from space. Its formation is still unknown. Then, a terrifying new weather weapon could be discovered from clouds emanating from an island in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Is Burning
programme.desc: Military analysts are concerned about a possible smoke screen over North Korea. Then, amateur archaeologists have discovered what could be two forgotten pyramids in Egypt via satellite image.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: New discoveries from space give experts new clues in the hunt for Jack the Ripper. When a strange object crash-lands in Antarctica, experts speculate it could be an alien visitor.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery in the Outback
programme.desc: A giant carving of a strange creature suddenly appears in the Australian Outback. Mysterious bright green lights illuminate the seas around Thailand. Top secret activity is discovered at Iran's nuclear facility.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Siberian Hell Pit
programme.desc: A massive chasm appears in a remote part of the Siberian forest, and locals call it to a gate to the underworld. Images of a nuclear missile launch silo in Montana are being manipulated. A bright green spiral appears in the Persian Gulf.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include desperate signs from lost veterans in Vietnam captured by satellite, a fleet of massive ships stranded in the middle of a vast desert and strange walls stretching vast distances across Northern California.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress
programme.desc: Images of earth from space reveal an intimate portrait of human activity; Cities glow bright while the wilderness remains dark; Why the Australian outback is lit up like a series of vast cities.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Scorpion
programme.desc: A nuclear submarine spying on Soviet maneuvers goes missing and its wreckage is mysteriously found on the ocean floor. The US Navy claims it was an accident, but declassified documents reveal startling new information that points to a Cold War cover up.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Yellowstone Supervolcano
programme.desc: Beneath Yellowstone National Park is one of the world's largest active volcanos, and it's poised to erupt at any moment; experts use seismic technology and visual imaging to reveal its catastrophic threat.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: Outgoing Jackie Galloway is found strangled and bound with ritualistic knots. Police investigate suspects in her inner circle but are shocked when a chance encounter with a prowler leads them to discover the murderer is a budding serial killer.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: A strange man violently attempts to kidnap a woman's children, but a 16-year old wrestler saves the day. And then, when a frightening cab robbery takes place in broad daylight, someone unexpected comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Stranger Danger
programme.desc: A man steals a car with two young siblings inside, causing a panic. As they try to escape, the kidnapper grabs the girl's hoodie, but her brother bravely fights back. And then, a 12-year-old stands up to the woman trying to kidnap her baby brother.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Bold Moves
programme.desc: A gunfight erupts when a mother and daughter are forced to defend their business from an armed robber. And then, a man who tries to rob a martial arts instructor quickly realizes he has messed with the wrong person.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Grab and Go
programme.desc: A robber attempts to hold up four young men at gunpoint, but he's in for a surprise when his victims fight back. And then, a man with a shotgun storms into a garage, but is outmatched by an employee who won't back down.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With My Kid
programme.desc: Two armed thieves approach a young woman to steal her car. But they get a shock when she fights back. And then, the father of a 15-year-old girl sets up a family sting to apprehend the 33-year-old man who is trying to seduce her.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Child's Nightmare
programme.desc: As a car heads straight into the ocean, with screaming children hanging out the windows crying for help, bystanders rush in to try and help.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Knock, Knock, Who's There?
programme.desc: In California, a doorbell camera captures a disoriented woman trying to break into a home as the terrified homeowner prepares to protect herself. And, in Texas, a panicked woman with restraints on her arms rings a doorbell in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Get Out
programme.desc: A busy couple watches helplessly through a streaming security camera as a man burglarizes their home. A woman inexplicably fires a gun into a house and then returns to toss in a flaming torch.

programme.title: Murder After the Big Game
programme.desc: A 21-year-old beauty pageant queen mysteriously disappears after a Super Bowl party.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: When a man with a shotgun bursts into his home late one night, a young man is forced to defend himself and protect his fiancee. And then, a man goes on a violent rampage in a diner, and two women find themselves in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Drunk Driving Terror
programme.desc: Two officers respond to a drunk driver speeding the wrong way down a highway and find themselves in a wildly dangerous situation. And then, a family follows a car swerving dangerously, and is forced to intervene to prevent tragedy.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: A strange man violently attempts to kidnap a woman's children, but a 16-year old wrestler saves the day. And then, when a frightening cab robbery takes place in broad daylight, someone unexpected comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Child's Nightmare
programme.desc: As a car heads straight into the ocean, with screaming children hanging out the windows crying for help, bystanders rush in to try and help.

programme.title: Murder After the Big Game

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Drunk Driving Terror
programme.desc: Two officers respond to a drunk driver speeding the wrong way down a highway and find themselves in a wildly dangerous situation. And then, a family follows a car swerving dangerously, and is forced to intervene to prevent tragedy.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With My Kid
programme.desc: Two armed thieves approach a young woman to steal her car. But they get a shock when she fights back. And then, the father of a 15-year-old girl sets up a family sting to apprehend the 33-year-old man who is trying to seduce her.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Knock, Knock, Who's There?
programme.desc: In California, a doorbell camera captures a disoriented woman trying to break into a home as the terrified homeowner prepares to protect herself. And, in Texas, a panicked woman with restraints on her arms rings a doorbell in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: A grieving father goes on the attack; Jealous obsession ends in murderous rage; A victim faces her stalker; A prosecutor throws a temper tantrum in court; A hero judge chases prisoners who bolt.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Hidden Clue
programme.desc: Will a hidden clue be the key to solving the vicious murder of a young woman?

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Scattered Clues, Shattered Lives
programme.desc: After two terrifyingly similar crimes, just days apart, a wave of fear sweeps across Aurora Colorado. Can police stop a hammer wielding madman before he strikes again?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer. Then... a young man's murder looks like a robbery gone wrong until Kenda learns the odd reason he's living there.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Beneath the Surface
programme.desc: There are only two explanations for how Patty Wlasiuk ended up dead after her truck plunged into a lake. Her husband Peter insists it was a suicide attempt, but a jury says he killed her. Now Chris and Melissa try to figure out what really happened.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: When a high school sophomore is found brutally raped and murdered, the clock is ticking as Las Vegas Police hunt a monster.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Closing Time
programme.desc: While heading up the investigation of two separate homicide cases, Detective Pat Postiglione makes a surprising discovery. The same psychotic killer is behind all the murders and he has a unique calling card.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Bloodbath in the Bottoms
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of three friends are discovered in a car abandoned in Shreveport's most notorious neighborhood. Demery must venture deep into the city's seedy underbelly to catch a killer with an inscrutable motive and an evil disposition.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: This One's Yours
programme.desc: Det. Pam Dunklin's first homicide as lead investigator begins one balmy summer afternoon when beloved local bartender, Jeff Joplin, is found beaten, strangled and stabbed to death on the floor of his home near Horseshoe Lake.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Bad Man
programme.desc: A young couple is bludgeoned in their own home and the only witness, the woman's three-year-old son. With nothing else to go on, detective Don Forgan begins a series of interviews with the witness with hopes it leads to a break in the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lake Erie is home to more than 2,000 shipwrecks mostly due to it's shallow bottom. For local fisherman, Chris Leclair, navigating a double life proves just as treacherous. When his wife, Karen uncovers his dark secret he's caught in a net of lies.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Jackson Lake Remake
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy lives in Atlanta with a vacation home on Jackson Lake, Georgia. They find the ideal property for their blended family, including three kids, but face a growing renovation list on a tight budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Family Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family. They find a charmer with plenty of space for up to 30 people, but their DIY reno reveals unexpected issues.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Trenton High School
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Trenton Central High School in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include four large clock faces and library ladders. In the shop, Mike and Tay build a table from an old jail bed.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: From Temporary to Permanent
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen begin on the foundation, but their nail gun goes on the fritz and the posts aren't level. Dog mushers Paige and Cody run low on supplies. Mike and Teresa work on their foundation with a damaged excavator.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Stressful Right Now
programme.desc: Mike and Teresa begin building their walls, but the winch is more dangerous than they realized. Paige and Cody use a boom truck, forcing the team to work extra cautiously. Mike and Kathleen find a nasty surprise at the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving the ultimate deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fries in Disguise
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Volusia County Fair in Florida, where two carnival classics get a makeover for the cheesy tater corndog and the black forest funnel cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King's Peach
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the Big Fresno Fair in California, where local legend Chicken Charlie has a triple treat stacked up on a stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fairground Showdown
programme.desc: In this all-star episode of Carnival Eats, host Noah Cappe visits California, home to some of the biggest and best fair in America.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party
programme.desc: There's so much to love about pizza- crispy crust, savory sauce, ooey-gooey cheese and endless options for toppings. Pizza might just be the perfect meal, and Eddie Jackson has a day full of out-of-the-box slices to prove it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Sharks After Dark
programme.desc: With the popularity of the Shark Pool, Chief must host two race nights. Henson, Your Mom and Chuck 55 all show up to challenge the gatekeeper, leaving Shane swimming for his survival. On the second race night, Chief and Shawn rematch for the top spot.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: On a gold streak, Dustin dives deeper than ever and uncovers the largest obstacle of his career. New recruit Scott finally gets the opportunity to prove himself in the water, but a rookie mistake could end his career just as it gets started.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Happy Endings
programme.desc: Dustin calls on local legend 'The Pirate' for help cracking a boulder blocking him from the richest ground of his life. After Fred is forced to put all diving on hold, Paul returns and they're on track to get gold for the first time this season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Dustin to the Rescue
programme.desc: Fred turns to his son Dustin for help when he uncovers a giant overhanging boulder at The Trifecta on the side wall that threatens to kill any diver below it. But tensions run high once Dustin takes control of Fred's operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Depths of Despair
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys are close to a huge gold cleanup. Ryan faces his worst fears as he dives deeper than ever into a crumbling, narrow 14-foot hole. Carlos finally hits bedrock at Rockfall Ravine and reveals that this dive site could pay out huge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Ride or Die
programme.desc: With their richest site picked clean, Dustin and crew move upstream to 'The Chute' a promising, yet dangerous site with rapids stronger than ever. Fred and crew rethink their operation and adapt the rock drag method to a vertical lift system.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Storm's a-Brewing
programme.desc: A monster storm hits the Carolinas and Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom risk their lives to run a batch of shine. Nearby, Josh and Bill fall prey to the same storm when a flood threatens their underground still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Shiner's Last Stand
programme.desc: Tickle splits from Tim, recruits a new still hand and heads into the woods to scout a new site. Mark, Jeff and Jim Tom double down and begin work on a second still to run barley scotch while Deputy Sheriff Chuck infiltrates an active moonshine operation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Prophecy Fulfilled
programme.desc: Tickle builds a new still and heads out on a midnight run and Josh goes ballistic when he damages the nearly completed underground still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Goes Rogue
programme.desc: Tickle goes it alone after his still hand Howard gets spooked by an intruder and disappears. Meanwhile, Josh and Bill discover toxic black mould in their underground still site, and Jeff's wife and son set up a second still to run barley scotch.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: An angry landowner busts Tickle, while Tim devises an ingenious new hiding spot for his backup stash of shine. Josh and Bill get into a bone-breaking fight at their new still site, and Mark bootlegs moonshine by canoe in the dead of night.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Guide for Love: Tickle Tales

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Guide for Love: Tickle Returns

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Running Out of Time
