programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Bluegrass Country Bigfoot
programme.desc: In Kentucky, the crew follows up on tips from locals that suggest the elusive beast is roaming the state. As they search for answers, they use an unusual technique to lure the big behemoth from out of hiding.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Search on Wasatch Mountain
programme.desc: In Utah, the team gets wind of a squatch-like creature roaming the Wasatch Mountain range. While there, witnesses help them uncover evidence that Bigfoot does exist and they are determined to find his whereabouts.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Big Apple Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team heads to New York to investigate a jaw-dropping video that may have captured a baby Bigfoot. While there, the crew returns to the site and is determined to find out whether Bigfoot has been breeding in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Evergreen State Sasquatch
programme.desc: In the Evergreen State, the crew investigates howls recently recorded in the Olympic Peninsula. While there, they join forces with eyewitnesses from Washington's BFRO and are determined to prove that Bigfoot runs wild in the forest.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Baiting the Beast
programme.desc: In Colorado, the team investigates footage pre-dating the infamous Patterson-Gimlin film. With the help of a Girl Scout Troop they attempt to bait Bigfoot from out of hiding.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Monster in the Outback
programme.desc: In Australia, the crew investigates recent eyewitness reports of the Yowie terrorizing the locals. While there, the team uses their expertise to track down where these creatures are most likely residing.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Snowy Mountain Sasquatch
programme.desc: The crew heads to southern Washington to investigate photos that reveal Bigfoot living on a snowy peak. On their journey, they capture photographic evidence that could lead to proof of what they have been searching for all along.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Baiting the Beast
programme.desc: In Colorado, the team investigates footage pre-dating the infamous Patterson-Gimlin film. With the help of a Girl Scout Troop they attempt to bait Bigfoot from out of hiding.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Monster in the Outback
programme.desc: In Australia, the crew investigates recent eyewitness reports of the Yowie terrorizing the locals. While there, the team uses their expertise to track down where these creatures are most likely residing.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Uncovered: Snowy Mountain Sasquatch
programme.desc: The crew heads to southern Washington to investigate photos that reveal Bigfoot living on a snowy peak. On their journey, they capture photographic evidence that could lead to proof of what they have been searching for all along.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: From deep inside the North Carolina Uhwarrie National forest comes one of the most convincing pieces of Bigfoot footage from the past 40 years. The team of BFRO investigators use decades worth of experiences to determine if this footage is the real deal.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bigfoot Crossing in Georgia
programme.desc: Famed Bigfoot investigator Matt Moneymaker and his team of Bigfoot Field Research Organization (BFRO) experts travel to the forests of northern Georgia to examine footage of what could be a Bigfoot running across the road.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Tiny Giants
programme.desc: Fluffy Keeshond puppies do their best to befriend a flock of ducks.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mojito Cat
programme.desc: Jackson deals with a young man with a genuine cat phobia. The Cat Daddy returns to Colorado to keep his favorite kitten from the rescue road trip in her adoptive home. Then, Jackson teaches a boy he met at the adoption event how to clicker train a kitten.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventures of Porcupine Dating
programme.desc: Rhino Kifaru is attempting to mate, despite his arthritic knees; tapir Jenny falls ill, and widowed porcupine Roxy meets a new mate.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mile-High Man-cave
programme.desc: Pete builds his manliest and largest treehouse yet for a Texas dad who wants to spend some man-time in the trees. At nearly 1000 square feet, this treehouse comes with its own 600-pound custom meat smoker and water gun turrets to fend off the girls.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy and his Octopus
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan was so impressed with his ATM shark tank that he's decided to come back and get a new tank for his octopus.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Taming the Beast
programme.desc: A single father comes to Villalobos hoping to find a new companion for himself and his son after a hard break-up. Mariah and Toney rescue a puppy that is at risk of never walking again unless he gets surgery.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Long Road Home
programme.desc: After more than ten years in the kennels, a survivor from Hurricane Katrina gets a chance at a forever home. Then, when Matt and Louise head out in search of a loose pit bull they discover more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Movie: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: After one of the men who killed his wife and daughter is set free, Clyde Shelton takes justice into his own hands and begins taking out everyone that was connected to the case.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: Starting From Scratch
programme.desc: A firefighter hero, his mom and three daughters are living in a cramped apartment and need a fresh start after the loss of his wife. With help from hundreds of volunteers, Jesse and the design team build a brand-new home in less than a week.

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: From Tornado to Tear Down
programme.desc: After a tornado damaged the home of a mom and her daughter, the property has been plagued by undesirable living conditions and mold. Jesse and the team step in to give them a French Country-inspired home that makes health concerns a thing of the past.

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: To Protect, Serve and Move That Bus
programme.desc: A Los Angeles police officer and his family work tirelessly to give back to the homeless population on Skid Row, and their home has become neglected. Jesse and the designers lead a team of volunteers to renovate their home to give them a spa-like retreat.

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: The Favorite Neighbors
programme.desc: After gang violence struck too close to home, a couple opened their doors to neighbourhood kids to provide a safe haven. The home has seen better days, so Jesse, the designers and volunteers give the large family a space to match the size of their hearts.

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: Serving Those Who Serve Us
programme.desc: A family that dedicated their lives to serving the country now serves the less fortunate, but time has not been kind to their 100-year-old Craftsman. It's up to Jesse and the design team to help restore the historical home to its former glory.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Madisonville Manor vs. Peaceful Palace
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple is ready to upgrade their home and want to get the best bang for their buck. This means they have to move outside the city.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Lakeview Luxury vs. Bayou Beauty
programme.desc: A couple in the medical field in New Orleans want to upsize their home for their family and move closer to amenities in the city. Later, Brittany must bring a kitchen up to date to guarantee a quick sale in a historic neighbourhood.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: The Garden Home vs. Acadian Manor
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple with hectic schedules looks for a bigger home with plenty of outdoor space where they can relax after a long day.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Bucktown Bungalow vs. Spanish Colonial
programme.desc: New Orleans natives have outgrown their house and want to find a property with more space. She's an interior designer and he's a contractor, so Brittany must work with their specific tastes to find the perfect home.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: 19th-century Masterpiece vs. Coliseum Square
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple with a growing family is looking to upgrade to a bigger home. He wants a bonus space where he can work from home, and she hopes to be near parks for the kids. Later, Brittany declutters a condo to ensure it flies off the market.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Ridgewood Riviera vs. Lakeview Luxury
programme.desc: A couple sells their CA home and are in a hurry to move to New Orleans. The wife would love a new construction in Uptown, while the husband is focused on location of new job.

programme.desc: A couple that made a fast purchase to accommodate their relocation to New Orleans wants to find a forever home. One loves the city's historic architecture while the other hopes for something modern, leaving Brittany to find a home they both can love.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Radiant River Home vs. Creekside Cottage
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple wants a bigger home in their current neighborhood. They hope to find a property with outdoor space, an open layout and room for the kids. Then, Brittany transforms a focal point wall to create an inviting feature for potential buyers.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Paradise Park vs. Italian Villa
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple needs a bigger home to support their growing family. He's willing to move outside the city limits, but she doesn't want to stray too far from the city. Later, Brittany and the team use a small budget to prep a condo for sale.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Could Have Been
programme.desc: Intelligence's investigation into the murder of Burgess's boyfriend threatens to reveal a dark side she was unaware of. The real motivation for his murder uncovers a much more unsettling truth.

programme.title: Movie: Ted 2
programme.desc: After tying the knot, newlyweds Ted and Tami-Lyn are ready to start a family. They prepare for artificial insemination, but in order to gain custody of his child, Ted must go to court to prove that he's a person.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Goes From Rags to Riches

programme.title: The Simpsons: Them, Robot

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Barking Bad
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, Charles and Dr. Brenda tackle the problems of a feisty alpaca, a troubled twosome of dairy cows and a miniature donkey with a fungus problem on its feet.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Die Hard
programme.desc: These are some of the worst ways to die in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Killers of the Deep
programme.desc: Explore the most riveting moments of the struggle for survival and supremacy in the wild.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Nazi Doomsday Project
programme.desc: Brand-new evidence reveals the secrets of a Nazi program to build a nuclear bomb, and using cutting-edge science and tech, experts uncover classified files that reveal how close Hitler came to this terrifying superweapon.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Finding Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Amelia Earhart's disappearance is one of America's greatest unsolved mysteries, but now, forensic science might finally crack the case, as experts examine human remains that could be proof positive of her whereabouts.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Death Relic of Christ
programme.desc: The Shroud of Turin is alleged to be the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ. It could be a total hoax; now, scientists use cutting-edge forensic analysis to finally determine the truth behind this astonishing holy relic.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Hills of the Forgotten
programme.desc: A desolate fortress in a secluded mountainside and the remnants of a town in the backwoods of Kentucky are now ghostly ruins; experts investigate the secrets of these remote, rural mysteries to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Beyond the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Witchcraft in the Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: It's a Christmas day murder scene Portland detectives will never forget, a young woman bound, gagged and mutilated in a horrific manner. And when the killer then turns his sick sights on Homicide Detective Molly Daul, the stakes rise even higher.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Intent: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: On a summer day in Springfield, Illinois, an infant daughter left in a sweltering SUV is the only sign of a young mother that's gone missing. A frantic search leads to an eerie sight at the edge of town, and a killer who may have more secrets to expose.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Cold Blue
programme.desc: Kay Weden finds her mother inexplicably murdered inside her own home. Then, investigators discover the frozen remains of her boyfriend in the icy peaks of Blue Ridge Mountains. Only by speaking with Kay do investigators realize she's being stalked.

programme.title: The Hiding Place
programme.desc: When 24-year-old Catherine's boyfriend takes her and her family hostage in their own home, her quick-thinking mother hides her in a desperate attempt to save her and everyone else's lives.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Cold Blue
programme.desc: Kay Weden finds her mother inexplicably murdered inside her own home. Then, investigators discover the frozen remains of her boyfriend in the icy peaks of Blue Ridge Mountains. Only by speaking with Kay do investigators realize she's being stalked.

programme.title: The Hiding Place
programme.desc: When 24-year-old Catherine's boyfriend takes her and her family hostage in their own home, her quick-thinking mother hides her in a desperate attempt to save her and everyone else's lives.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Who Killed Jane Doe?: The Tent Girl
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a tent bag in the Kentucky woods. A thousand miles away, a family searches for a missing mother of three. Both cases go unsolved for decades, until a man's obsession and a family's determination converge, uncovering the truth.

programme.title: Who Killed Jane Doe?: Daughter, Sister, Diamond, Doe
programme.desc: The body of an unidentified young woman turns up on the side of an Oklahoma highway. Her name remains a mystery... until investigators find a family looking for their missing daughter, who's become entrapped in a suspicious relationship.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Bridge of Betrayal
programme.desc: A car fire blazing near a beach sends detectives on a search that ends with a young woman found dead and her mother yearning for answers. The killer's attempt to eliminate evidence actually gives investigators the clues they need to catch him.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: She Had Everything
programme.desc: The bullet-riddled body of 19-year old college student Amanda Anderson is found by her younger brother, Nate. Detectives interview friends and neighbors, however, it's a microscopic discovery by the forensics team that leads to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Bodies
programme.desc: After struggles in their youth, they are setting out on new paths with new hope but then the unthinkable happens. Their horrific murders are chilling. Find out who would kill them in such a violent way and if they had any idea they were in danger.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: She Gave No Warning
programme.desc: When two young women vanish without a trace, investigators are haunted by the things they leave behind - a car with the keys still in the ignition, a pair of shoes and a coat. They disappear with no warning.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Stone Cold Fusion
programme.desc: The leading advocate for the controversial science of cold fusion is beaten to death and investigators run the full gamut of suspects, from corporate executives to drug-crazed burglars, to find his killer.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Hitchhike to Hell
programme.desc: Colorado police in hot pursuit of a serial killer are horrified when the pre-recorded message of a pager found in the snow near a victim's abandoned vehicle reveals an unthinkable predator: one sworn to protect and serve.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Overload
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen move to interior work, but the remote location is still slow with progress. At Paige and Cody's site, mechanical failures prevent the project from finishing before dog sled season. As Mike and Teresa build higher, it gets more dangerous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mud Men
programme.desc: Matteo Lundgren is taking the art of natural building to a whole new level with his custom-designed Cob houses that blend with the environment surrounding them.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Den
programme.desc: Beau Dunavant bought a piece of land in Tres Piedras, New Mexico, as a gift for his girlfriend, Samantha Inman, where they can build a home made of mostly recycled materials and lots of dirt.

programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Friends and Neighbors/ Just the Two of Us
programme.desc: Timmy's parents don't have many friends; Timmy and Trixie are the last two people on Earth

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Remy Rides Again/ Hassle in the Castle
programme.desc: Timmy slips into Cosmo and Wanda's fish castle; Remy fools Timmy into being his friend.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Out Darn Spotlight
programme.desc: Jimmy is desperate to get the staring role opposite dream girl Betty Quinlan in the school musical, Macbeth in Space.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Foul Bull/ The Science Fair Affair
programme.desc: During a class trip to a rodeo, Jimmy, Carl and Sheen fall for a cute little cowgirl.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard: A Dream Birthday
programme.desc: The animals feel bad for the Farmer after seeing that everyone forgot his birthday, so they decide to throw him a party and tell him it's a dream, but the Farmer gets carried away.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Oh Brother Where Art Thou/ The Wall
programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pirates Life/ World Record
programme.desc: When pirates show up at the house, the boys do all they can to protect a treasure chest that arrived for Dave. The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete to set a world record in hopes of winning a new virtual reality game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Gift/ Theo Knows Best
programme.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest for his birthday and insists he wear it to an upcoming business meeting. When Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has their own ideas on how the money should be spent.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Tour Bus/ Game Show
programme.desc: When Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus, Dave has no idea of the problems ahead. Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Beyond the Known Universe
programme.desc: The Team meets a strange alien robot called the Fugitoid.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Moons of Thalos 3
programme.desc: When the Team crash lands on an ice moon along with the enemy, they must put their differences aside to survive.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Tuba Triumph
programme.desc: After witnessing a boy being bullied, Ravi takes him under his wing.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Sound and Fury
programme.desc: The Rangers’ skills are put to the test when Blaze uses evil tech to massively enhance his Robotron’s destructive power.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil League of Mutants
programme.desc: Baron Draxum assembles of league of villains against the Turtles.

programme.title: It's Pony: Distractions/ The Giving Chair
programme.desc: Continual distractions almost derail part of a science project others are depending on; a trip to the bookstore finds the comfiest chair in the world, which may have mystical powers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Fresh Sparkles / Noodle Burger Ploy
programme.desc: When Big Hero 6 find Mr. Sparkles working at the Pizza Party-torium, he tells them he’s decided to leave the world of crime behind. Noodle Burger Boy and the mascots abduct Fred.

programme.title: Baymax Dreams: Baymax Dreams of Glitch
Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Frasier: We Two Kings

programme.title: Reba: Sweet Child O'Mine
programme.desc: Barbra Jean panics a pregnant Cheyenne by remarking that her baby may turn out to be a mini-Kyra. Reba decides its time she told Cheyenne that she was the mean sister, not Kyra.

programme.title: Reba: Locked and Loaded
programme.desc: Kyra has been secretly taping Van and posting the video on YouTube.com for the entire world to see and mock. Reba advises Brock to make a grand romantic gesture to save his marriage to Barbra Jean.

programme.title: Reba: As We Forgive Those...
programme.desc: Barbra Jean convinces a reluctant Reba to coax the truth out of Kelly. Barbra Jean suspects that Kelly was brought in by management to be her successor. Meanwhile, Cheyenne and Van break some bad news to Brock.

programme.title: Reba: Bullets Over Brock
programme.desc: Reba learns that Brock has been secretly living in the garage for several days so he can spend time apart from Barbra Jean, who thinks he is on a business trip. Brock confesses that he doesn't know how to mend things with his wife.

programme.title: Reba: Cheyenne's Rival
programme.desc: Reba is thrilled when she finds the perfect first home for Cheyenne and Van to buy. Meanwhile, not wanting the public to know they have separated, Barbra Jean asks Brock to pretend they are still happily married.

programme.title: Reba: She's With the Band
programme.desc: Kyra tells Reba and Brock that she is postponing college to go on tour with her band. When Reba puts her foot down and tells Kyra she won't allow her to make this mistake, Kyra moves out. Meanwhile, Cheyenne and Van can't agree on decorating the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Blanche's brother, Clayton, comes to Miami for a visit, and Blanche goes all out fixing him up on blind dates. However, Rose learns the truth: Clayton is gay and is afraid to tell Blanche the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan Takes a Wife
programme.desc: Dorothy has second thoughts about Stan when he stands by her after Sophia falls ill.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Auction
programme.desc: The ladies plan to spend all of their savings to buy a dying artist's painting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blanche is troubled by her relationship with a blind man who likes her personality.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Impotence of Being Ernest
programme.desc: Rose is crazy about her new beau, Ernie, but learns that he is impotent, so she helps him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Me Tender
programme.desc: When Sophia sets Dorothy up on a blind date, Dorothy secretly falls for the seemingly simple man, claiming 'he's the greatest lover she ever had'. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose join 'Be a Pal'.

programme.title: Movie: Love Blossoms

programme.title: Movie: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A woman accidentally catches a wedding bouquet before her engaged friend. She is then reminded of a family myth that puts her friend’s happiness at stake.

programme.title: Movie: Bound and Babysitting
programme.desc: A woman is forced to baby-sit with her college nemesis and begins to see him in a new light.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show

programme.title: The Office: Tallahassee
programme.desc: After Dwight and his team arrive in Tallahassee, Dwight competes with his coworkers to impress Sabre special projects president, Nellie Bertram.

programme.title: The Office: After Hours
programme.desc: Andy makes everyone in the office stay late in order to cover for those who went to Florida.

programme.title: The Office: Test the Store

programme.title: Drunk History: Game Changers
programme.desc: A look into the early history of hip hop, with Questlove, Method Man, Raven-Symone and more. A look at Barry Gordy, the man who invented Motown and also the activism work of Nichelle Nichols ('Star Trek').

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida
programme.desc: Jim tries to save Dwight from being fired after Robert California reveals that he hates Nellie's business plan. Meanwhile, Andy learns that Erin isn't coming back to Scranton.

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl
programme.desc: Andy makes a life-altering decision and drives across the country to pursue Erin. Meanwhile, Nellie shows up in Scranton and tries to claim the manager position.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Guide for Love: Tickle's Engaged
programme.desc: Tickle announces upcoming nuptials, and Tim learns why his best friend can't stop being an outlaw. Mike tries a long-distance bootleg that puts him in the crosshairs of the law, and Josh bets that Sin city needs one more vice.

programme.desc: When old friends embark on a risky bootleg operation, it's newlywed and former bondswoman, Mrs. Tickle, who can save them all from the law.

programme.desc: Mark and Digger deal with a Mason jar shortage. Mike and Jerry must return to land they've been warned off. Tim pushes his steam boiler to the breaking point with his scheme to repurpose a massive tank as an oversized pot still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caught Red-Handed
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws recruit Josh to build a winter-proof still site. Mountain man Mark converts a free load of sugar beets into high-proof moonshine. Mike and Jerry crack a few nuts to turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: It's a Girl!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Mother's Touch
programme.desc: Dana is looking for her dream dress that her recently departed mother would approve of. Katy wants to add fabric from her late mother's gown to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Better Than the First

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Family Rules
programme.desc: Tanya brings her outspoken family to help her find a blush-coloured dress. Mary Beth, who has ovarian cancer, is excited to dress shop with three generations of family members. Stella decides to bring only her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Sister Wives: A Breaking Point
programme.desc: Just as Robyn's family has adjusted to Flagstaff they learn that the owner is selling their rental house and they have 60 days to leave. Robyn and Kody fight in front of the kids over it and Aurora has a full-on panic attack, perhaps her worst ever.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Gay and Religious
programme.desc: The sister wives visit Mariah and her fiancée, Audrey, in Chicago. Meri opens up about how badly she behaved when Mariah first came out as gay and Mariah confesses about her struggles growing up gay in their polygamist church.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Prison of Garbage
programme.desc: Deborah and Mary both started hoarding in the wake of a personal tragedy. After Deborah killed her drug-addicted boyfriend in self-defence, she and her son have lived amid growing piles of trash and unused possessions.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: As Bad As It Gets
programme.desc: After more than twenty years in the same apartment, compulsive hoarder Randy is being forced to leave by order of his landlord, and must somehow clear out the eight-foot-high mountains of stuff in a few days.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa's Story
programme.desc: Jennifer and her daughter Marissa are stuck in a codependent relationship that has put both of their lives in jeopardy, with a combined weight of over 900-lbs. See if Jennifer can regain control and save both their lives before it's too late.

programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Julie is excited to start her new food blog but when no one 'likes' her page, she and Todd go on a food journey, which takes them from fine French cuisine to foraging for their own food.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: Grayson decides he wants to be a real city slicker for his 9th birthday, and persuades his entire family to stay overnight at a working dude ranch, where they will test how country the Chrisleys really are.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Chinchilla Chill Pad
programme.desc: Antonio and his team design and build an elaborate system of tunnels and towers spanning two rooms for a family and their seven adorable, fluffy chinchillas.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Cat Build Gone Wild
programme.desc: A couple wants their Savannah cat and foster kittens to safely enjoy the outdoors. Antonio's solution is an intricate system of outdoor catwalks and double-decker enclosures with cat-friendly plants, natural climbing surfaces and all the toys a cat needs.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Bunny Beach Bungalow
programme.desc: Antonio meets a couple whose home has been taken over by their rescued bunnies. He'll transform their overgrown backyard into a beach-themed oasis for humans and bunnies, complete with predator-proof enclosures.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Pot-bellied Pig Palace
programme.desc: Antonio meets a family and their pot-bellied pig who has turned their front yard into a dustbowl. Antonio goes hog wild and designs the ultimate piggy paradise with a new pig house, mud pit, space to run and an activity wall to keep Mr. Pickles happy.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Emerald Paradise
programme.desc: A couple has many requests when transforming their backyard into their dream Caribbean vacation spot that includes a pair of waterfalls and more. Later, a family's outdated pool is converted into stunning outdoor space with a rock waterwall and grotto.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: The Ultimate Abode
programme.desc: An Alaskan adventure-seeking couple tasks Pete to build a custom arboreal abode complete with a sauna for next-level rest and relaxation. Later, NTS transforms a couple of mountaineers' 200-acre Kentucky property into the ultimate climber's haven.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Emerald Paradise
programme.desc: A couple has many requests when transforming their backyard into their dream Caribbean vacation spot that includes a pair of waterfalls and more. Later, a family's outdated pool is converted into stunning outdoor space with a rock waterwall and grotto.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: The Ultimate Abode
programme.desc: An Alaskan adventure-seeking couple tasks Pete to build a custom arboreal abode complete with a sauna for next-level rest and relaxation. Later, NTS transforms a couple of mountaineers' 200-acre Kentucky property into the ultimate climber's haven.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: How 'Bout Them Apples
programme.desc: Pete trucks out to Walden, NY, to build a treehouse tasting room for Angry Orchard. The pavilion-style structure will elevate orchard-goers high above the acres of apple trees where they can enjoy a glass of hard cider and soak in views of the orchard.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Zac Brown's Space Crab
programme.desc: Country superstar Zac Brown tasks Pete with building an otherworldly treehouse at Camp Southern Ground, a state-of-the-art camp for kids. The team constructs a zinc-wrapped treehouse that's half spaceship, half horseshoe crab, and fully out of this world.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppy Power
programme.desc: Little Roo is the smallest of a litter of Beagles, but proves to his much bigger sisters that he is top dog. A litter of super fluffy Bichon Frise pups follow mom's path to show dog stardom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mayday! Mayday!
programme.desc: Jackson experiences his most vicious, and most illuminating, cat attack of not just the season, but in years, at the claws of a troubled cat named May. Also, the Cat Daddy must help a nervous-wreck of a cat guardian move her two very feral cats to Canada.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Rare okapi Stomp must woo female K'Tusha, there's a struggle to be pack leader among the African painted dogs, and Raja the Bornean river turtle meets two new prospective mates.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Scottish Sky Garden
programme.desc: The team tackles a Tulsa build in kilts to create a Scottish cottage in a robust pin oak. Pete builds his first ever 'sky bridge' that connects the couple's home directly to their new treetop paradise.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tank This!
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde revisit some of the most unthinkable items the ATM crew has turned into tanks over the years. They share never before seen footage that documents the challenge of creating some of the most unconventional tanks.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Why We Go On
programme.desc: Tia battles a local shelter on the fate of a pit bull she risked it all to save. Another dog that was rescued from death has a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Blind Hope
programme.desc: When a blind pit bull is attacked by other dogs, the Villalobos team steps-in and takes responsibility for his recovery. Also, a couple from Pittsburgh mourning the loss of their pit bull visits Villalobos and fall in love with one of Tia's favorite dogs.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Face of Danger
programme.desc: The game warden's marine team searches a foreign cargo vessel in the Gulf of Mexico. A man is suspected of poaching 15 deer out of season and the game wardens discover a large marijuana growing operation outside of Dallas.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Three couples take a week-long vacation to figure out why they got married.

programme.title: Martin: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Exasperated with their bickering friends and feuding relatives, Martin and Gina sneak away on the night before their wedding.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is a Beach
programme.desc: Martin and Gina escape the pandemonium at home and finally have the perfect wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Martin: Martin in the Corner Pocket
programme.desc: The honeymoon is over for Gina when Martin stays out one night, playing pool and getting hustled until he loses even the clothes off his back.

programme.title: Martin: Kill Him with Kindness
programme.desc: Martin thinks Gina wants to kill him for life insurance money.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Buried Pleasure
programme.desc: Holt admits to Cleveland that he wishes he had a special someone in his life. Determined to help his lonely friend, Cleveland introduces Holt to the cat-loving redhead Jill. Meanwhile, Cleveland Jr. and Rallo anticipate the 'birth' of Rallo's pet fish.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Curious Case of Jr. Working at The Stool
programme.desc: A feud erupts between father and son when Cleveland Jr. gets a job at Cleveland's preferred bar and begins judging his father's drinking habits. Meanwhile, Roberta competes with the rich girl in school.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Once Upon a Tyne in New York
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna take a road trip to the Big Apple for an overdue honeymoon, and to Donna's dismay, Cleveland allows the Stoolbend gang to tag along to help Coach McFall rekindle a long lost romance.

programme.title: The Parkers: Blind Date Mistake
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim go on a blind date with a father-son duo when they appear on 'Blind Date.'

programme.title: The Parkers: Who's Your Mamma?
programme.desc: A young woman named Samantha McGee claims that she and Kim were switched at birth.

programme.title: The Parkers: Hands Off, Grandma
programme.desc: Nikki's grandma comes to visit and causes friction when she tries to seduce Prof. Oglevee.

programme.title: The Parkers: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Elaine, a new friend in Nikki's life, threatens the bond between her and Andell.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown Knight
programme.desc: When Cleveland and Donna are mugged at an ATM, Cleveland is accidentally wounded in the tussle. By the time the story hits the local news, the attention goes to Cleveland's head, but Cleveland's version isn't the whole story.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Gone With the Wind
programme.desc: When Cleveland is diagnosed with high cholesterol, Donna puts him on a new high-fibre diet, which causes an intestinal backlash. It may stink up the place, but Cleveland quickly realizes his gas might score him points in the karaoke contest.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Acting as his brother's wingman, Rallo gives Cleveland Jr. a few pointers on how to win over the girl of his dreams, Chanel. Although when Cleveland Jr. finds out her boyfriend is local rap star Kenny West, he challenges Kenny to a rap battle.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown History Month
programme.desc: Cleveland and Cleveland Jr. teach Donna and the kids their tradition of celebrating Black History Month. However, when Rallo learns about his heritage at school, he provokes Cleveland into a battle royale with his neighbour.

programme.title: Black-ish: Rock, Paper, Scissors, Gun
programme.desc: After a break-in down the block, Dre talks about getting a gun, but Bow is not comfortable with the idea, which leads everyone to debate the many different ways to protect your family.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dr. Hell No
programme.desc: After Dre gets his yearly physical and comes home traumatized, Pops explains his generation's strong aversion towards healthcare and admits that he hasn't seen a doctor in years.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kim Who?
programme.desc: When Kim rides T's scooter without a helmet, she becomes injured and loses her memory.

programme.title: The Parkers: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Prof. Oglevee has surgery but doesn't get much rest when Nikki visits him in the hospital.

programme.title: The Parkers: Et Tu, Andell?
programme.desc: The gang hits a local club to help Nikki relieve some stress, but the opposite happens.

programme.title: Martin: Blow, Baby, Blow
programme.desc: When music producer Biggie Smalls comes to town, everybody wants to be a star.

programme.title: Martin: Ring a Ding, Ding, Ding Gone
programme.desc: Martin takes off his wedding ring when his pals complain that it scares off women, but he's the frightened one when he has to explain its loss to Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Love T.K.O.
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's romantic weekend gets interrupted by everyone else's love woes.

programme.title: Martin: He Say, She Say
programme.desc: Cole meets a special woman with a big secret.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ethnic Tip
programme.desc: Will complains that no black history is being taught in his school and Vivian takes over.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Philip becomes very upset when Will sneaks out with Philip's mother to a rap concert.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It Had to Be You

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Nice Lady
programme.desc: Will tries to prove that he's a responsible person so he can take the car to Nevada.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married?

programme.title: Movie: Blade
programme.desc: A powerful vampire plots to use the blood of the legendary Daywalker Blade, a half-vampire with all the strengths of vampires and none of their weaknesses, to summon a mighty Blood God.

programme.title: Movie: Constantine
programme.desc: This big screen adaptation of the graphic novel 'Hellblazer' revolves around John Constantine, a tortured soul who seeks redemption by banishing evil spirits from Earth. He teams up with a detective to solve her twin sister's mysterious suicide.

programme.desc: An ex-hit man awakens one night to find his home invaded by members of the Russian mob, who beat him, steal his car and kill his beloved dog. With the most important thing in his life taken away from him, he comes out of retirement to exact vengeance.
